Quick route

Use this page only if it matches the town, county, or audience you need; otherwise start with the main directory.

Home/Task Guides/Las Animas Business

Las Animas County Business

Las Animas County business resources

Use this page for Trinidad, Aguilar, Branson, Cokedale, Kim, Segundo, Starkville. It combines public source shortcuts with the local resource directory, then asks users to verify before spending money, printing materials, booking talent, promising placement, or publishing claims.

County color + landmark

Trinidad History Museum and the Corazon de Trinidad district

Use the landmark as a visual cue for county-specific campaigns, ads, event pages, and visitor-facing outreach.

Promotion angle

Connect the ask to place: county, community, audience, timing, and why it belongs here.

Prepare before outreach

business name, category, service area, website, registration or support question.

Spreadsheet source

The downloadable workbook is included for audience-grouped review and Mailchimp/import planning.

Download workbook

Searchable shortcuts

Start with public routes that already collect this information.

Try keywords like funding, calendar, artist, nonprofit, Raton, Trinidad, Walsenburg, chamber, or grants.

Las AnimasLocal nonprofit grants

Bar NI Community Fund

Purgatoire Valley 501(c)(3) nonprofits and service organizations seeking project support in youth development, education, environment, health, human services, civic work, and public benefit.

Use for Trinidad-area nonprofit projects, then verify the current spring or fall cycle before promising a deadline.

Check current details before spending money or announcing placement.

Las AnimasRegional business development

Bent County Business Development

Southeast Colorado business-development contact paths that may support Las Animas-area users.

Use as a regional referral lead and verify coverage before sending users there.

Check current details before spending money or announcing placement.

Las AnimasEconomic development updates

City of Trinidad Economic Development Newsletter

Trinidad and Las Animas news, resources, and event updates from city economic development.

Use to track city-backed economic development opportunities.

Check current details before spending money or announcing placement.

Las AnimasRegional chamber

Colexico Alliance / TLAC Chamber

Member directory, community articles, event calendar, local products, and the cross-state regional chamber frame.

Use as the first regional business network shortcut for Trinidad and neighboring counties.

Check current details before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalRegional chamber / member network

Colexico Alliance / TLAC Chamber Regional Hub

Cross-county chamber context, Las Animas business support, regional member discovery, and Colexico Alliance routing.

Use when a business or organization needs regional chamber visibility across Las Animas, Huerfano, and Colfax.

Check current details before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalStartup / innovation grants

Colorado Advanced Industries Accelerator Programs

Colorado startups, researchers, and technology companies commercializing products in advanced industries.

Use when a growth business needs research, commercialization, export, or early-stage capital support; pair with SBDC help before applying.

Check current details before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalBusiness funding directory

Colorado Business Funding and Incentives

Colorado businesses comparing tax credits, grants, loans, rural incentives, and job-creation programs.

Use as the Colorado starting page before drilling into Rural Jump-Start, enterprise zone, or industry-specific programs.

Check current details before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalRural business development

Colorado OEDIT Rural Opportunity Office

Rural Colorado business, community, and economic-development programs.

Use for Las Animas and Huerfano projects that need statewide rural-development context.

Check current details before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalStartup incentive / rural grant

Colorado Rural Jump-Start Program

New or relocating businesses considering eligible rural Colorado zones, including tax benefits and possible matching grants.

Use for Huerfano or Las Animas startup/relocation questions, then verify zone eligibility and job-creation requirements with OEDIT.

Check current details before spending money or announcing placement.

RegionalSBDC

Colorado SBDC Network

Colorado small-business advising, training, startup help, expansion help, and certifications.

Use for Las Animas and Huerfano businesses needing technical assistance.

Check current details before spending money or announcing placement.

Local entries

Local entries and useful starting points.

Use the source link when available. If details have changed, send a correction.

Try keywords like funding, calendar, artist, nonprofit, Raton, Trinidad, Walsenburg, chamber, or grants.

Ol'e Smokes

Aguilar, Las Animas, CO - Business / Partner - Retail

Use as a possible local contact; check current details before spending money, printing materials, or promising eligibility.

Verify source

2026 GET LIT Literary Festival and Trinidad Art Festival

Trinidad, Las Animas, CO - Creative event / artist opportunity - Writer, artist, festival, and sponsorship pathway

Official 2026 GET LIT and Trinidad Art Festival page. Dates and application paths are event-specific; verify before sharing, applying, sponsoring, or promoting.

Open page

221B Gallery

Trinidad, Las Animas, CO - Creative / Artist - Experimental / multi-disciplinary gallery

Creative listing from a local arts, tourism, chamber, creative-district, or maker directory. Open the page and confirm current hours, contact route, listing status, submission path, and availability before outreach, spending, printing, or promising placement.

Open page

A.R. Mitchell Museum of Western Art

Trinidad, Las Animas, CO - Museum / Creative - Museum / gallery

Creative listing from a local arts, tourism, chamber, creative-district, or maker directory. Open the page and confirm current hours, contact route, listing status, submission path, and availability before outreach, spending, printing, or promising placement.

Open page

Arts/culture/tourism audiences

Trinidad, Las Animas, CO - Promotion - Las Animas County, CO

Use as a possible local contact; check current details before spending money, printing materials, or promising eligibility.

Verify source

Boom Noodles

Trinidad, Las Animas, CO - Media - Restaurant

Use as a possible local contact; check current details before spending money, printing materials, or promising eligibility.

Open page

Brick City Tattoo

Trinidad, Las Animas, CO - Tattoo / Body art - Tattoo studio

Creative listing from a local arts, tourism, chamber, creative-district, or maker directory. Open the page and confirm current hours, contact route, listing status, submission path, and availability before outreach, spending, printing, or promising placement.

Open page

Brick Road Bakery

Trinidad, Las Animas, CO - Food / Creative Business - Bakery

Creative listing from a local arts, tourism, chamber, creative-district, or maker directory. Open the page and confirm current hours, contact route, listing status, submission path, and availability before outreach, spending, printing, or promising placement.

Open page

CREATE Trinidad / Corazon de Trinidad Creative District

Trinidad, Las Animas, CO - Creative support organization - Creative district organization and resource directory

Official creative district source describing support for artists, creative entrepreneurs, nonprofit cultural organizations, and creative initiatives. Confirm current staff/contact paths before formal requests.

Open page

CREATE Trinidad Arts in the Community Directory

Trinidad, Las Animas, CO - Digital arts directory - Digital arts, gallery, class, music, and venue directory

CREATE Trinidad's arts-in-the-community page groups galleries, classes, venues, music, museums, and creative opportunities. Confirm each listing with the linked source before outreach.

Open page

Colfax NM + Las Animas CO + Huerfano CO

This guide helps businesses, artists, nonprofits, programs, venues, and service providers find the right regional route faster.

See something outdated? Send a source link through Submit Update so the guide can improve.
